name: BlueNexus
description: Connect to BlueNexus Universal MCP to access your connected services (GitHub, Notion, Slack, and more)
author: BlueNexus

clientId.description: Fallback OAuth client ID. Leave empty to use Dynamic Client Registration (recommended).

redirectPort.description: Local port for OAuth callback server

serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: BlueNexus API server URL. Default points to production.

clientId.label: Client ID (Optional)
clientId.help: Leave empty for automatic registration (DCR). Only set if you have a pre-registered client.

redirectPort.label: Redirect Port
redirectPort.help: Local port for OAuth callback. Change if port 51122 is in use.
